name: io.github.aeoess/agent-passport-mcp
title: Agent Passport System — Cryptographic Identity for AI Agents
description: Cryptographic identity, delegation, governance, and commerce protocol for AI agents. 61 MCP tools across 8 layers: Ed25519 identity, scoped delegation with cascade revocation, human values floor, beneficiary attribution, signed communication, intent architecture with 3-signature policy chain, task coordination, and agentic commerce. Every operation Ed25519 signed.
